mano_cua.result_summary: 佛历年份显示bug已复现：切换到th-TH locale后，日历弹出框正确显示2569佛历年(2026+543)，但日期输入文本框错误显示2560(差9年)。同一组件中calendar popup与text input年份不一致，text input层面的佛历年份转换有误。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The screenshot clearly confirms the bug. The calendar popup header shows เมษายน 2569 (April 2569 BE - correct Buddhist Era year for 2026 CE), but the date input text field shows 24/04/2560 20:15 (2560 is WRONG - should be 2569). The year 2560 in Buddhist Era = 2017 CE, which is 9 years ago. This confirms the bug: React Datetime Picker in th-TH locale cannot correctly parse and display Buddhist Era year in the text input field.
